verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in Noah kiangah, “Nang leh na innkuanpih mi khempeuh teembaw sungah pai un. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih khang mite sung panin nang bek a thuman na hihna ka hong thei hi
Ganhing siangtho nupa kop sagih, ganhing a sianglo nupa kop khat
huih lak vasate zong nupa kop sagih, leitungah amau' nam a man'than' lohna dingin la in
Bang hang hiam cih leh ni sagih sungin sun sawmli leh zan sawmli sung leitungah guah ka zusak ding hi. Ka bawlsa nuntakna a nei peuhmah leitung panin ka phiatkhia ding hi,” a ci hi
Noah in zong Topa' thupiak khempeuh a hih hi
Leitungah tuiciin a tun' lai-in Noah kum zaguk pha hi
Tuiciin a pelh dingin Noah, a tapate, a zi leh a tapate' zite teembaw sungah pai uh hi
Ganhing siangthote, a sianglo ganhingte, vasate, leitunga a bokvak peuhmah
a nupa kopin Pasian in Noah a thupiaksa bangin teembaw sungah Noah tawh pai uh hi
A ni sagih ni-in leitungah tuiciin tung hi
Noah' nuntak kum zaguk kum, a kha nihna, tua kha ni sawmlesagih ni-in vana om a thuk mahmah tuikhukte puakkhamin, vantung tawlette kihong hi
Sun sawmli leh zan sawmli sung leitungah guah zu hi
Tua ni teekteekin Noah leh a tapate Shem, Ham, Jafeth, leh Noah' zi leh a tapate' zi thumte, amau tawh teembaw sungah a tum uh hi
Amaute leh gamsa peuhmah amau' nam ciat, innsa khempeuh amau' nam ciat, leitungah a bokvak peuhmah amau' nam ciat, leh vasa peuhmah amau' nam ciat, vasa namkim amau' nam ciatin a tum uh hi
Nuntak husan'na a nei khempeuh a nupa kop ciatin Noah tawh teembaw sungah a pai uh hi
Pasian in Noah tungah a thupiakna bangin nuntakna a nei khempeuh teembaw sungah a lut khit ciangin Topa in Noah kong a khaknelh hi
Leitungah tuiciin ni sawmli sung omden hi. Tui tam semsem a, teembaw laamto-in, leitung' tungah khangin sangto lai hi
Tui khangto-in leitungah tam mahmah hi. Tui tungah teembaw laam hi
Leitungah tui khangkhang ahih manin mual lian a sangte khempeuh tuumcip hi
Mual liante tungah tui omto lai a, tuate tungah pi sawmnihlenih thuk-in tuumcip hi
Leitungah a nungta khempeuh, vasate, innsate, gamsate, a hon honin leitungah a hon om ganhingte khempeuh leh mi khempeuh a si uh hi
Leitungah a om, nuntakna hu a nei peuhmah a si uh hi

Mihing, ganhing, a bokvakte leh huih lak vasate, leitunga om nuntakna a nei peuhmah amah in phiatkhia hi. Leitung panin amaute kiphiatkhia hi. Noah leh amah tawh teembaw sunga a omteng bek a suakta uh hi
Ni za leh ni sawmnga sung leitungah tui om hi.
